# User

The `user` object provides information on the Intercom end-user. It is sent to your web-service as part of the `submit` flow when an end-user interacts with a card.

[More on the user object can be found on the REST API Reference through this link.](/docs/references/1.2/canvas-kit/requestobjects/user) The user object provided in the messenger framework will contain the same attributes as noted in the REST API Reference.
